steps.name: Given  User logged into the system as a auditor
Given  Client "uniqueClient" already exists
When  User starts creating new audit case
And  User selects cut off date
And  User fills case name "uniqueCase"
And  User selects currency
And  User selects account standard
And  User fills TE with "15"
And  User fills SAD with "15"
And  User confirms audit case details
And  User expands opening balance section
And  User clicks upload files
Then  Second upload modal is visible
And  User uploads TB file
And  User maps tb column "Balance Sheet" with value "Balance Sheet"
And  User maps tb column "Assembly Code" with value "Assembly"
And  User maps tb column "Account Number" with value "Account Number"
And  User maps tb column "Account Name" with value "Account Name"
And  User maps Balance column
And  User proceed to next step
And  User uploads Assembly data file
Then  Assembly mapping modal is visible
And  User switch to the "NewOpeningAss" tab, assembly modal
And  User maps assembly column "Assembly code" with value "Assembly Class"
And  User maps assembly column "Balance" with value "E BalanceF"
And  User maps assembly column "Assembly Name" with value "D Assembly Description"
And  User saves and continue
And  User creates a bundle
And  User expands closing balance section
And  User clicks upload files for closing balance
And  User uploads TB file for closing balance
Then  TB mapping modal is visible
And  User switch to the "NewClosingTB" tab, tb modal
And  User maps tb column "Balance Sheet" with value "Balance Sheet"
And  User maps tb column "Assembly Code" with value "Assembly"
And  User maps tb column "Account Number" with value "Account Number"
And  User maps tb column "Account Name" with value "Account Name"
And  User maps Balance column
And  User proceed to next step
And  User uploads Assembly data file
Then  Assembly mapping modal is visible
And  User switch to the "NewClosingAss" tab, assembly modal
And  User maps assembly column "Assembly code" with value "Assembly Class"
And  User maps assembly column "Balance" with value "E BalanceF"
And  User maps assembly column "Assembly Name" with value "D Assembly Description"
And  User saves and continue
And  User creates a bundle
And  User creates audit case
Then  Created audit case is displayed on the page

labels.value: User creates new audit case for client
